main.name: Satendra Kumar
main.description: Senior Software Engineer with 4.5+ years of experience specializing in high-performance BI tools, algorithmic trading systems, and real-time collaboration platforms.
main.bio: I am a Senior Software Engineer focused on architecting and scaling complex data-driven applications. From optimizing grid calculations to achieve a 96% latency reduction to building real-time collaboration tools and automated delta-neutral trading engines, I thrive on solving high-impact technical challenges.

education.school: Impact College of Engineering and Applied Sciences (ICEAS)

work.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
work.description: Lead developer for enterprise BI solutions and high-frequency trading architecture.
highlights: Developed a specialized Delta Trading platform for options contracts, featuring dynamic strategy configurations and automated risk-management parameters.
Architected and implemented a custom real-time Chat Application using WebSockets, integrated directly into the BI platform.
Optimized Luckysheet core calculation engine, reducing report generation latency by 96% (from 40 minutes to 90 seconds).
Engineered a comprehensive automated options trading engine using Python, Flask, Celery, and Redis, integrating with kite-connect API.
Directed the end-to-end customization of Apache Superset for enterprise-grade dashboards.

work.title: Senior Technical Support Engineer (Network/Security)
work.description: Technical leadership in enterprise network infrastructure and security operations.
highlights: Managed and optimized critical data and voice circuits for Fortune 500 enterprise clients.
Provisioned and troubleshot complex network security protocols and enterprise-grade connectivity.
Ensured 99.9% uptime for business-critical voice circuits through proactive monitoring and rapid incident response.
Collaborated with global engineering teams to resolve tier-3 technical escalations.

projects.title: Delta Neutral Options Engine
projects.description: A sophisticated trading platform for Delta-neutral options strategies, featuring automated Greeks management and dynamic configuration files.

projects.title: Real-time BI Collaboration Suite
projects.description: A high-concurrency chat and collaboration application integrated into enterprise BI tools, allowing real-time data sharing and conversation.

projects.title: 96% Latency Optimization (Luckysheet)
projects.description: Refactored core calculation engines to reduce BI report latency from 40 minutes to under 90 seconds.

projects.title: Enterprise Business Mobile App
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile application for enterprise resource management built with Expo and React Native.
